professional_email.text:
# Draft

Hi Brian,

Just confirming receipt of the IRS payment proof I sent yesterday. Let me know if you need anything else from me here.

Best,
Matthew

---

# Brief

**Register chosen:** A — formal-warm.

**Voice tells used:** direct ask, short body, standard professional closer.

**Anti-patterns avoided:** no generic AI preamble.

personal_email.text:
# Draft

Hi Catherine,

Hope you are doing well. It would be lovely to see you this summer if the timing works out, and I will send through a few windows once I know travel dates.

Lots of love,
Matthew

---

# Brief

**Tone chosen:** affection.

**Voice tells used:** warm but direct.

**Anti-patterns avoided:** no professional closer, no bullet list.

slack_draft.text:
=== Draft ===
Can you take a quick look at the PR when you have a minute? Main thing I want checked is whether the auth path still reads cleanly.

=== Register ===
DM-1to1

=== Voice tells used ===
- direct ask first
- compact context

=== Anti-pattern check ===
- no formal greeting / closer
- no preamble
- no bullet wall

copyedit_pass.text:
# Fake Matt Copyedit Review

## Findings

### HIGH - tighten the promise

Rule cited: writing_style.md / concrete claims. The intro overstates the launch impact; rewrite it as a narrower operational claim.

## Interview queue

No interview items.
